mapper.select: SELECT PAGE_ID AS pageId, PAGE_NAME AS pageName, ROUTE_PATH AS routePath, DOMAIN_CODE AS domainCode, MENU_CODE AS menuCode, LAYOUT_VERSION AS layoutVersion, DESIGN_TOKEN_VERSION AS designTokenVersion, ACTIVE_YN AS activeYn FROM UI_PAGE_MANIFEST WHERE COALESCE(ACTIVE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' ORDER BY DOMAIN_CODE ASC, ROUTE_PATH ASC, PAGE_ID ASC

SELECT COMPONENT_ID AS componentId, COMPONENT_NAME AS componentName, COMPONENT_TYPE AS componentType, OWNER_DOMAIN AS ownerDomain, PROPS_SCHEMA_JSON AS propsSchemaJson, DESIGN_REFERENCE AS designReference, ACTIVE_YN AS activeYn, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(UPDATED_AT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS updatedAt FROM UI_COMPONENT_REGISTRY ORDER BY COMPONENT_TYPE ASC, COMPONENT_ID ASC

SELECT MAP.MAP_ID AS mapId, MAP.PAGE_ID AS pageId, MAP.LAYOUT_ZONE AS layoutZone, MAP.COMPONENT_ID AS componentId, MAP.INSTANCE_KEY AS instanceKey, MAP.DISPLAY_ORDER AS displayOrder, MAP.CONDITIONAL_RULE_SUMMARY AS conditionalRuleSummary, REG.COMPONENT_NAME AS componentName, REG.COMPONENT_TYPE AS componentType, REG.OWNER_DOMAIN AS ownerDomain, REG.PROPS_SCHEMA_JSON AS propsSchemaJson, REG.DESIGN_REFERENCE AS designReference FROM UI_PAGE_COMPONENT_MAP MAP LEFT JOIN UI_COMPONENT_REGISTRY REG ON MAP.COMPONENT_ID = REG.COMPONENT_ID WHERE MAP.PAGE_ID = #{value} ORDER BY MAP.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC, MAP.INSTANCE_KEY ASC

SELECT MAN.PAGE_ID AS pageId, MAN.PAGE_NAME AS pageName, MAN.ROUTE_PATH AS routePath, MAN.MENU_CODE AS menuCode, MAP.LAYOUT_ZONE AS layoutZone, MAP.COMPONENT_ID AS componentId, MAP.INSTANCE_KEY AS instanceKey, MAP.DISPLAY_ORDER AS displayOrder, MAP.CONDITIONAL_RULE_SUMMARY AS conditionalRuleSummary FROM UI_PAGE_COMPONENT_MAP MAP INNER JOIN UI_PAGE_MANIFEST MAN ON MAP.PAGE_ID = MAN.PAGE_ID WHERE MAP.COMPONENT_ID = #{value} ORDER BY MAN.PAGE_ID ASC, MAP.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC, MAP.INSTANCE_KEY ASC
